channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: The PlayStation Store Summer Games Fest Sale is now on
item.content:encoded:
The PlayStation Store Summer Games Fest Sale is now live on the PlayStation Store, alongside the already running Days of Play sale. 

The Summer Games Fest Sale has over 3,000 items discounted, with more than 75% off games, DLC, and other digital trinkets.  Now that sounds great, but dig a little deeper and you will find  a fairly large portion of the discounts are for DLC packs for ‘Simulator’ games.  If that’s your thing then you are in for a treat, for the rest of us, not so much.

Obviously, we’re not going to list every single discount but here are a couple worth looking at:

    • No Man’s Sky PS4 & PS5 – £15.99 Discounted from original price of £39.99
    • HITMAN World of Assassination £23.19 Discounted from original price of £57.99
    • CONTROL Ultimate Edition – £3.49 Discounted from original price of £34.99
    • Metro Awakening + Arizona Sunshine 2 – £24.99 Discounted from original price of £49.99
    • Still Wakes the Deep – £7.49 Discounted from original price of £29.99
    • Kerbal Space Program Enhanced Edition Complete – £12.49 Discounted from original price of £49.99
    • Layers of Fear – £9.99 Discounted from original price of £24.99
    • Terminator: Resistance Enhanced – £9.99 Discounted from original price of £39.99

Do not forget that you have until June 10 to pick up some cut-price subscriptions via the Days of Play Sale. 

Coming just after Sony raised the price of 1-month and 3-month PS Plus subs, 12-month subscriptions are the most cost-effective way to get access to the online service and the game library on higher tiers.

New subscribers can save up to 33% on a 12-month membership, though this will depend on region and tier – PS Plus Essential only has a 20% discount in these deals now, PS Plus Extra has a 25% discount and PS Plus Premium is the tier with the 33% saving. Upgrading to PS Plus Premium can get you a 33% saving on the remaining time and days.

The discounts are available through to 10th June, as follows:

  • PlayStation Plus Essential – £47.99 (20% off £59.99)
  • PlayStation Plus Extra – £74.99 (25% off £99.99)
  • PlayStation Plus Premium – £80.39 (33% off £119.99)

Source: PS Store



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/05/the-playstation-store-summer-games-fest-sale-is-now-on/
